title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Lilith, Kid, Saturn, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.text: The Navy Admiral Greenbull came here!! I couldn't do anything!
